market_overview.headline: Broad market deterioration with SPY and QQQ both in bearish unstacked patterns while BTC remains in full bear mode.
market_overview.detail: Only 21% of stocks remain in Full Bull structure with 34% in Full Bear, marking significant trend degradation. Both major indices showing potential bullish crossover alerts but from weak technical positions.

momentum_themes.headline: Storage and Semiconductor Momentum Acceleration
momentum_themes.detail: Electronic technology dominates momentum leaderboard with storage plays like SNDK and WDC showing explosive moves. Memory and semiconductor equipment themes driving outperformance.

sector_analysis.headline: Energy Dominates While Tech Services Collapse

strongest.note: Perfect bullish score with all 15 stocks in Full Bull structure.
Strong performance driven by energy services and infrastructure plays.
Defensive rotation benefiting utility stocks in uncertain environment.

weakest.note: Massive tech selloff with 85% of names in bearish structure.
Banking sector under pressure with 80% in bearish patterns.
Complete sector breakdown with all names in bearish structure.

sector_analysis.detail: Clear rotation from growth/tech into energy and defensive sectors. Technology services showing worst performance while energy minerals maintain perfect bullish structure.

items.text: 34% of stocks in Full Bear structure signals broad trend deterioration
High volume pullbacks in quality names suggest institutional selling pressure
Technology services 85% bearish - avoid catching falling knives in growth stocks
SPY and QQQ both unstacked - major index weakness limits upside potential
